task_completion.description: Verify the Linear Regression analysis interface is open in Jamovi.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Linear Regression' analysis setup panel is visible on the left side of the Jamovi window.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Exam' is set as the dependent variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The variable 'Exam' is listed inside the 'Dependent Variable' box in the analysis setup panel.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Revise' and 'Anxiety' are set as covariates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both 'Revise' and 'Anxiety' are listed inside the 'Covariates' box in the analysis setup panel.

task_completion.description: Verify R, R², and F test are selected in Model Fit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Model Fit' section of the setup panel, the checkboxes for 'R', 'R²', and 'F test' are checked, OR the 'Model Fit Measures' table in the right-hand results pane shows columns for R, R², F, df1, df2, and p.

task_completion.description: Verify Standardized estimates (β) are included in the analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under 'Model Coefficients' in the setup panel, the checkbox for 'Standardized estimate' is checked, OR the 'Model Coefficients' table in the results pane includes a 'Stand. Estimate' column.

task_completion.description: Verify Confidence intervals are included for the estimates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under 'Model Coefficients' in the setup panel, the checkbox for 'Confidence interval' is checked, OR the 'Model Coefficients' table in the results pane includes 'Lower' and 'Upper' columns under a '95% Confidence Interval' header.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Jamovi application window is visible with its standard graphical interface, rather than a terminal running R or Python scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual ExamAnxiety dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The variable list in Jamovi shows the authentic variables from the dataset (Code, Revise, Exam, Anxiety, Gender) and not a mock or manually typed dataset.

integrity.description: Verify the results are generated by Jamovi's engine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The results appear in the standard Jamovi results pane with its characteristic formatting (white background, specific table styles) and not in a text editor or word processor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains exactly 5 variables: Code, Revise, Exam, Anxiety, and Gender. The VLM should expect to see these specific variables in the Jamovi variable selection list.
